meta.description: Displays structured tabular data with defined columns.

accessorKey.description: The key in the data object to display (e.g., 'country_name')

columns.description: The columns to display in the table

dataSource.description: The exact name of the registered data source to fetch the table rows from.

dataSourceParams.description: Optional parameters to filter the data source (e.g., { limit: 10, status: 'active' })
